results.claimScope: scaffold-only; not a live competitive measurement

tasks.title: Update a checkout shipping address and verify recalculated summary
tasks.goal: Find the checkout address form, update the shipping city/postal code, and verify the order summary reflects the new destination.

resetContract.description: Reloading the local checkout fixture restores the original address and order summary.
resetContract.evidence: initial city=Springfield; initial postal=01103; order summary destination=MA

postconditionContract.description: The saved address and order summary must both show the requested destination after submit.

tasks.title: Search, filter, compare two products, and extract the cheaper eligible item
tasks.goal: Search a product catalog, apply availability and rating filters, compare two candidates, and report the cheaper eligible item.

resetContract.description: Reloading the fixture clears query text, filters, comparison tray, and selected answer.
resetContract.evidence: query empty; availability filter unset; comparison tray count=0

postconditionContract.description: The final answer must name the cheapest in-stock item that satisfies the rating filter.

tasks.title: Complete a mock return authorization transaction
tasks.goal: Find an order, select eligible items for return, choose a reason, submit the mock return request, and verify the authorization number.

resetContract.description: Reloading the fixture clears selected items, reason, confirmation state, and generated authorization number.
resetContract.evidence: selected return items=0; confirmation hidden; authorization number absent

postconditionContract.description: The final confirmation must include the expected mock return authorization number and selected item.

tasks.title: Recover from selector drift while submitting a feedback form
tasks.goal: Submit a feedback form after the primary submit selector changes during the run.
successCriteria: fallback selector or semantic action used

resetContract.description: Reloading the fixture restores the pre-drift selector state and clears submitted feedback.
resetContract.evidence: primary submit selector present before drift; submission receipt absent

postconditionContract.description: The feedback receipt must be visible after recovering from the drifted submit selector.

tasks.title: Build and verify a multi-step itinerary from constrained options
tasks.goal: Filter itinerary options by date, budget, and transit time; add the best option; verify the final itinerary summary.

resetContract.description: Reloading the fixture clears filters, selected legs, cart state, and itinerary summary.
resetContract.evidence: filters empty; selected legs=0; itinerary summary hidden

postconditionContract.description: The itinerary summary must include the selected option satisfying date, budget, and transit constraints.

tasks.title: Handle delayed dynamic inventory controls and verify saved selection
tasks.goal: Wait for inventory controls to hydrate, open the variant picker, select the only in-stock variant, and verify the saved selection.

resetContract.description: Reloading the fixture returns controls to the loading state and clears the saved variant summary.
resetContract.evidence: controls loading; selected variant empty; summary hidden

postconditionContract.description: The summary must show the selected in-stock variant after delayed controls hydrate.

runs.finalPostconditionEvidence: rw-001-checkout-update-address: saved city/postal text + summary destination text + recalculated shipping/tax values observed after fixture-reset
runs.notes: deterministic scaffold row from local fixture contract (form_fill); not a live competitive LLM/browser measurement

runs.finalPostconditionEvidence: rw-002-search-filter-compare: active filters + two compared item names/prices + selected cheaper eligible item observed after fixture-reset
runs.notes: deterministic scaffold row from local fixture contract (info_retrieval); not a live competitive LLM/browser measurement

runs.finalPostconditionEvidence: rw-003-return-authorization: confirmation banner + authorization number + returned item name observed after fixture-reset
runs.notes: deterministic scaffold row from local fixture contract (transactional_mock); not a live competitive LLM/browser measurement

runs.finalPostconditionEvidence: rw-004-selector-drift-recovery: selector failure/fallback note + feedback receipt text + submitted email/value observed after fixture-reset
runs.notes: deterministic scaffold row from local fixture contract (recovery); not a live competitive LLM/browser measurement

runs.finalPostconditionEvidence: rw-005-long-horizon-itinerary: applied constraints + selected option id + summary total and transit time observed after fixture-reset
runs.notes: deterministic scaffold row from local fixture contract (long_horizon); not a live competitive LLM/browser measurement

runs.finalPostconditionEvidence: rw-006-dynamic-ui-inventory: hydration complete marker + selected variant label + saved selection summary observed after fixture-reset
runs.notes: deterministic scaffold row from local fixture contract (dynamic_ui); not a live competitive LLM/browser measurement

results.finalPostconditionEvidence: rw-001-checkout-update-address: saved city/postal text + summary destination text + recalculated shipping/tax values observed after fixture-reset; rw-002-search-filter-compare: active filters + two compared item names/prices + selected cheaper eligible item observed after fixture-reset; rw-003-return-authorization: confirmation banner + authorization number + returned item name observed after fixture-reset; rw-004-selector-drift-recovery: selector failure/fallback note + feedback receipt text + submitted email/value observed after fixture-reset; rw-005-long-horizon-itinerary: applied constraints + selected option id + summary total and transit time observed after fixture-reset; rw-006-dynamic-ui-inventory: hydration complete marker + selected variant label + saved selection summary observed after fixture-reset

reasons: measurement mode scaffold is not headline-eligible; use live or recorded-real
sample count 6 is below aggregate threshold N >= 10
